ul.li: Operand Size: 2 Bytes (Absolute 16-bit address or 8-bit signed offset).
Branch Prediction: The 'then' branch is the linear path; modern CPUs favor this via static prediction if no dynamic data exists.
Stack Effect: JUMP_IF_FALSE consumes the top-of-stack element.
Memory Alignment: Labels are logical; actual offsets depend on variable-length opcode encoding.

g.text: Conditional Jump: Skips next block if stack-top is False.
Unconditional Jump: Prevents executing else-block after then-block completes.
Branch A (Then): Placed immediately after jump to benefit from fall-through prediction.
Branch B (Else): Out-of-line block reached only via explicit redirection.
